# jans_uma_resources_by_client (Data Source)

Data source for looking up UMA resources associated with a client (GET /uma/resources/clientId/{clientId}).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) The client id (inum) to look up UMA resources for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `resources` (List of Object) The UMA resources associated with the given client. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources))

<a id="nestedatt--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resources`

Read-Only:

- `clients` (List of String)
- `description` (String)
- `dn` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `inum` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `scopes` (List of String)
